payload.title: Incremental replay on append with safe fallback
payload.description: In the same transaction as the upload insert, fast-path apply the new batch ONLY when it is a pure tail-append (batch min ts >= max applied ts) with no create-number collision; otherwise full tenant-scoped replay. Emit renumbered notices and cascade id/FK rewrites for renumbered tickets in the cache. Document the tail-append invariant. (From SCP-124, AMENDMENT 1.)
